sections.paragraph:
verb לזרוע

to sow, seed; scatter, disperse

verb להיזרע

be sown, seeded; scattered, dispersed

verb להזריע

to inseminate, fertilize; produce seed

verb הוזרע

be inseminated, fertilized

masculine noun

seed; kernel sperm

masculine noun

semen

masculine noun

posterity, offspring, children
